cards.title: Queen Momentum
cards.text: Queen drives the round and chooses the exact challenge that happens next.

cards.title: King Momentum
cards.text: King controls the moment and calls a confident dare for Queen.

cards.title: King Yields
cards.text: King follows Queen's next instruction completely before the turn ends.

cards.title: Queen Yields
cards.text: Queen follows King's chosen prompt and keeps the energy playful.

cards.title: Queen Spotlight
cards.text: Queen owns the turn and performs one bold line or action.

cards.title: King Spotlight
cards.text: King owns the turn and performs one bold line or action.
